title: CVS Health backs 2022 guidance offered in May
text: CVS Health Corp. CVS, -2.13% is sticking with its profit guidance for 2022, according to a regulatory filing published Thursday. The drug store chain said senior management would be meeting with investors during the rest of June and will reaffirm the guidance offered on May 4.
